constraints.description: Prefer locally-owned restaurants, tour guides, and accommodations. Avoid international hotel chains and franchises when possible.
Total trip cost must not exceed budget.
Use only budget travel platforms (hostelworld.com, couchsurfing, local recommendations). Avoid expensive travel booking sites with high commissions.
Prefer public transit, biking, walking, or shared shuttles. Avoid single-occupancy rental cars and short-haul flights when alternatives exist.
Only book tours and experiences with documented eco-certifications or guides certified by tourism boards. No predatory wildlife experiences or mass-market day-trip mills.
Carry reusable water bottle and avoid single-use plastics. Refuse plastic bags, straws, and containers.

notes: Committed to sustainable travel and supporting local communities environmentally.  Ugh! Sustainability priorities often conflict with rock-bottom pricing.
